verses.geez:
ወሖረ ፡ አቢሜሌክ ፡ ወልደ ፡ ሮበዓም ፡ ውስተ ፡ ስቂማ ፡ ኀበ ፡ አኀወ ፡ እሙ ፡ ወተናገሮሙ ፡ ለኵሉ ፡ አዝማደ ፡ ቤተ
                  ፡ እሙ ።

translations.lxx: And Abimelech son of Jerobaal went to Sychem to his mother's brethren; and he spoke to them and to all the kindred of the house of his mother's father, saying,
translations.kjv: And Abimelech the son of Jerubbaal went to Shechem unto his mother’s brethren, and communed with them, and with all the family of the house of his mother’s father, saying,

verses.geez:
ወይቤሎሙ ፡ ተናገርዎሙ ፡ ሊተ ፡ ለሰብአ ፡ ስቂማ ፡ ወበልዎሙ ፡ ምንትአ ፡ ይኄይሰክሙአ ፡ ሰብዓኑ ፡ ብእሲአ ፡
                  ይኰንኑክሙአ ፡ ኵሎሙአ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ ሮቦዓምአ ፡ አው ፡ አሐዱአ ፡ ብእሲአ ፡ ይኰንንክሙአ ፡ ወተዘከሩአ ፡ ከመአ ፡ ሥጋክሙአ ፡
                  ወዐጽምክሙአ ፡ አነአ ።

translations.lxx: Speak, I pray you, in the ears of all the men of Sychem, saying, Which is better for you, that seventy men, even all the sons of Jerobaal, should reign over you, or that one man should reign over you? and remember that I am your bone and your flesh.
translations.kjv: Speak, I pray you, in the ears of all the men of Shechem, Whether is better for you, either that all the sons of Jerubbaal, which are threescore and ten persons, reign over you, or that one reign over you? remember also that I am your bone and your flesh.

verses.geez:
ወተናገሩ ፡ ሎቱ ፡ አኀወ ፡ እሙ ፡ ምስለ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ሰብአ ፡ ሲቂማ ፡ ኵሎ ፡ ዘንተ ፡ ነገረ ፡ ወሜጥዎ ፡ ለልቦሙ ፡
                  ኀበ ፡ አቢሜሌክ ፡ ወይቤሉ ፡ እኁነ ፡ ውእቱ ።

translations.lxx: And his mother's brethren spoke concerning him in the ears of all the men of Sychem all these words; and their heart turned after Abimelech, for they said, He is our brother.
translations.kjv: And his mother’s brethren spake of him in the ears of all the men of Shechem all these words: and their hearts inclined to follow Abimelech; for they said, He is our brother.

verses.geez:
ወወሀብዎ ፡ ፸ብሩረ ፡ እምነ ፡ ቤተ ፡ በዓል ፡ ወተዓሰበ ፡ ቦን ፡ አቢሜሌክ ፡ ዕደወ ፡ ሐቃልያነ ፡ ወመደንግፃነ ፡
                  ወሖሩ ፡ ወተለውዎ ።

translations.lxx: And they gave him seventy pieces of silver out of the house of Baalberith; and Abimelech hired for himself vain and cowardly men, and they went after him.
translations.kjv: And they gave him threescore and ten pieces of silver out of the house of Baalberith, wherewith Abimelech hired vain and light persons, which followed him.

verses.geez:
ወቦአ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ቤተ ፡ አቡሁ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ኤፍሬም ፡ ወቀተሎሙ ፡ ለአኀዊሁ ፡ ለደቂቀ ፡ ሮቦዓም ፡ ፸ብእሴ ፡ በአሐቲ ፡
                  እብን ፡ ወተርፈ ፡ ኢ[ዮአ]ታም ፡ ወልደ ፡ ሮቦዓም ፡ ዘይንእስ ፡ እስመ ፡ ተኀብአ ።

translations.lxx: And he went to the house of his father to Ephratha, and slew his brethren the sons of Jerobaal, seventy men upon one stone; but Joatham the youngest son of Jerobaal was left, for he hid himself.
translations.kjv: And he went unto his father’s house at Ophrah, and slew his brethren the sons of Jerubbaal, being threescore and ten persons, upon one stone: notwithstanding yet Jotham the youngest son of Jerubbaal was left; for he hid himself.

verses.geez:
ወተጋብኡ ፡ ኵሎሙ ፡ ሰብአ ፡ ሲቂማ ፡ ወኵሉ ፡ ቤተ ፡ መሐሎን ፡ ወሖሩ ፡ ወአንገሥዎ ፡ ለአቢሜሌክ ፡ ሎሙ ፡ ንጉሠ ፡
                  በኀበ ፡ ዕፀ ፡ በላኖ ፡ እንተ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ሲቂማ ።

translations.lxx: And all the men of Sicima, and all the house of Bethmaalo, were gathered together, and they went and made Abimelech king by the oak of Sedition, which was at Sicima.
translations.kjv: And all the men of Shechem gathered together, and all the house of Millo, and went, and made Abimelech king, by the plain of the pillar that was in Shechem.

verses.geez:
ወዜነውዎ ፡ ለኢ[ዮአ]ታም ፡ ወሖረ ፡ ወቆመ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ርእሰ ፡ ደብረ ፡ ጋሪዝን ፡ ወጾርኀ ፡ ወበከየ ፡ ወይቤሎሙ ፡
                  ስምዑኒ ፡ ሰብአ ፡ ሲቂማ ፡ ወይስማዕክሙ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ።

translations.lxx: And it was reported to Joatham, and he went and stood on the top of mount Garizin, and lifted up his voice, and wept, and said to them, Hear me, ye men of Sicima, and God shall hear you.
translations.kjv: And when they told it to Jotham, he went and stood in the top of mount Gerizim, and lifted up his voice, and cried, and said unto them, Hearken unto me, ye men of Shechem, that God may hearken unto you.

verses.geez: ሖሩአ ፡ ዕፀውአ ፡ ያንግሡአ ፡ ሎሙአ ፡ ንጉሠ ፡ ወይቤልዋ ፡ ለዕፀ ፡ ዘይት ፡ ንግሢ ፡ ለነ ።

translations.lxx: The trees went forth on a time to anoint a king over them; and they said to the olive, Reign over us.
translations.kjv: The trees went forth on a time to anoint a king over them; and they said unto the olive tree, Reign thou over us.

verses.geez:
ወትቤሎሙ ፡ ዕፀ ፡ ዘይት ፡ እኅድግኑ ፡ ቅብዕየ ፡ ዘሰብሐ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ በላዕሌየ ፡ ወእጓለ ፡ እመሕያው ፡ ወእሑር
                  ፡ እንግሥ ፡ ላዕለ ፡ ዕፀው ።

translations.lxx: But the olive said to them, Shall I leave my fatness, with which men shall glorify God, and go to be promoted over the trees?
translations.kjv: But the olive tree said unto them, Should I leave my fatness, wherewith by me they honour God and man, and go to be promoted over the trees?

verses.geez: ወይቤልዋ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ዕፀው ፡ ለበለስ ፡ ንዒ ፡ ንግሢ ፡ ለነ ።

translations.lxx: And the trees said to the fig-tree, Come, reign over us.
translations.kjv: And the trees said to the fig tree, Come thou, and reign over us.

verses.geez: ወትቤሎሙ ፡ በለስ ፡ እኅድግኑ ፡ ምጥቀትየ ፡ ወፍሬ[የ] ፡ ቡሩከ ፡ ወእሑር ፡ እንግሥ ፡ ለዕፀው ።

translations.lxx: But the fig-tree said to them, Shall I leave my sweetness and my good fruits, and go to be promoted over the trees?
translations.kjv: But the fig tree said unto them, Should I forsake my sweetness, and my good fruit, and go to be promoted over the trees?

verses.geez: ወይቤልዎ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ዕፀው ፡ ለወይን ፡ ነዓ ፡ ንግሥ ፡ ለነ ።

translations.lxx: And the trees said to the vine, Come, reign over us.
translations.kjv: Then said the trees unto the vine, Come thou, and reign over us.

verses.geez:
ወይቤሎሙ ፡ ወይን ፡ እኅድግኑ ፡ ወይንየ ፡ ወትፍሥሕትየ ፡ ዘበኀበ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ወበኀበ ፡ እጓለ ፡ እመሕያው ፡
                  ወእሑር ፡ እንግሥ ፡ ለዕፀው ።

translations.lxx: And the vine said to them, Shall I leave my wine that cheers God and men, and go to be promoted over the trees?
translations.kjv: And the vine said unto them, Should I leave my wine, which cheereth God and man, and go to be promoted over the trees?

verses.geez: ወይቤልዋ ፡ ዕፀው ፡ ለዕፀ ፡ ራምኖን ፡ ንዒ ፡ አንቲ ፡ ንግሢ ፡ ለነ ።

translations.lxx: Then all the trees said to the bramble, Come thou and reign over us.
translations.kjv: Then said all the trees unto the bramble, Come thou, and reign over us.

verses.geez:
ወትቤሎሙ ፡ ዕፀ ፡ ራምኖን ፡ እመ ፡ አማን ፡ ታነግሡኒ ፡ በጽድቅ ፡ ላዕሌክሙ ፡ ንዑ ፡ አጽልሉ ፡ ታሕተ ፡ ጽላሎትየ ፡
                  እመ ፡ ኢወፅአት ፡ እሳት ፡ እምነ ፡ ራምኖን ፡ ወትበልዖ ፡ ለአርዘ ፡ ሊባኖስ።

translations.lxx: And the bramble said to the trees, If ye in truth anoint me to reign over you, come, stand under my shadow; and if not, let fire come out from me and devour the cedars of Libanus.
translations.kjv: And the bramble said unto the trees, If in truth ye anoint me king over you, then come and put your trust in my shadow: and if not, let fire come out of the bramble, and devour the cedars of Lebanon.

verses.geez:
ወይእዜኒ ፡ እመ ፡ አማን ፡ በጽድቅ ፡ ገበርክሙ ፡ ወአንገሥክምዎ ፡ ለአቢሜሌክ ፡ በከመ ፡ ገበርክሙ ፡ ምስለ ፡
                  ኢየሮበዓም ፡ ወምስለ ፡ ቤቱ ፡ ወእመ ፡ በከመ ፡ ዕሴተ ፡ እዴሁ ፡ ገበርክሙ ፡ ሎቱ ፤

translations.lxx: And now, if ye have done it in truth and integrity, and have made Abimelech king, and if ye have wrought well with Jerobaal, and with his house, and if ye have done to him according to the reward of his hand,
translations.kjv: Now therefore, if ye have done truly and sincerely, in that ye have made Abimelech king, and if ye have dealt well with Jerubbaal and his house, and have done unto him according to the deserving of his hands;

verses.geez: በከመ ፡ ተቃተለ ፡ አቡየ ፡ ለክሙ ፡ ወገደፈ ፡ ነፍሶ ፡ ቅድሜክሙ ፡ ወአድኀነክሙ ፡ እምእደ ፡ ምድያም ፤

translations.lxx: as my father fought for you, and put his life in jeopardy, and delivered you out of the hand of Madiam;
translations.kjv: (For my father fought for you, and adventured his life far, and delivered you out of the hand of Midian:

verses.geez:
ወአንትሙ ፡ ተንሣእክሙ ፡ ላዕለ ፡ ቤተ ፡ አቡየ ፡ ወቀተልክሙ ፡ ደቂቆ ፡ ፸ብእሴ ፡ በአሐቲ ፡ እብን ፡ ወአንገሥክምዎ ፡
                  ለአቢሜሌክ ፡ ወልደ ፡ ዕቅብቱ ፡ ላዕለ ፡ [ሰብአ ፡] ሲቂሞን ፡ እስመ ፡ እኁክሙ ፡ ውእቱ ።

translations.lxx: and ye are risen up this day against the house of my father, and have slain his sons, being seventy men, upon one stone, and have made Abimelech the son of his bondwoman king over the men of Sicima, because he is your brother:
translations.kjv: And ye are risen up against my father’s house this day, and have slain his sons, threescore and ten persons, upon one stone, and have made Abimelech, the son of his maidservant, king over the men of Shechem, because he is your brother;)

verses.geez:
ወእመሰ ፡ በጽድቅ ፡ ወበርትዕ ፡ ገበርክሙ ፡ ምስለ ፡ ሮቦዓም ፡ ወቤቱ ፡ በዛቲ ፡ ዕለት ፡ ቡሩካነ ፡ አንትሙሂ ፡
                  ወተፈሥሑ ፡ በአቢሜሌክ ፡ ወውእቱኒ ፡ ይትፌሣሕ ፡ ብክሙ ።

translations.lxx: if then ye have done truly and faithfully with Jerobaal, and with his house this day, rejoice ye in Abimelech, and let him also rejoice over you:
translations.kjv: If ye then have dealt truly and sincerely with Jerubbaal and with his house this day, then rejoice ye in Abimelech, and let him also rejoice in you:

verses.geez:
ወእመ ፡ አኮሰ ፡ ትጻእ ፡ እሳት ፡ እምነ ፡ አቢሜሌክ ፡ ወትብልዖሙ ፡ ለሰብአ ፡ ሲቂሞን ፡ ወለቤተ ፡ መሐሎን ፡ ወትፃእ
                  ፡ እሳት ፡ እምነ ፡ ሰብአ ፡ ሲቂሞን ፡ ወእምነ ፡ ቤተአ ፡ መሐሎንአ ፡ ወትብልዖአ ፡ ለአቢሜሌክአ ።

translations.lxx: but if not, let fire come out from Abimelech, and devour the men of Sicima, and the house of Beth-maalo; and let fire come out from the men of Sicima and from the house of Beth-maalo, and devour Abimelech.
translations.kjv: But if not, let fire come out from Abimelech, and devour the men of Shechem, and the house of Millo; and let fire come out from the men of Shechem, and from the house of Millo, and devour Abimelech.

verses.geez:
ወጐየ ፡ ኢዮአታም ፡ ወሮጸ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ፍኖት ፡ ወአምሠጠ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ራራ ፡ ወነበረ ፡ ህየ ፡ እምነ ፡ ገጸ ፡ አቢሜሌክ
                  ፡ እኁሁ ።

translations.lxx: And Joatham fled, and ran away, and went as far as Bæer, and dwelt there out of the way of his brother Abimelech.
translations.kjv: And Jotham ran away, and fled, and went to Beer, and dwelt there, for fear of Abimelech his brother.

verses.geez: ወ[ተ]መልአከ ፡ አቢሜሌክ ፡ ለቤተ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ ሠለስተ ፡ ዓመተ ።

translations.lxx: And Abimelech reigned over Israel three years.
translations.kjv: When Abimelech had reigned three years over Israel,

verses.geez:
ወፈነወ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ጋኔነ ፡ እኩየ ፡ ማእከለ ፡ አቢሜሌክ ፡ ወማእከለ ፡ ሰብአ ፡ ሲቂሞን ፡ ወክሕድዎ ፡ ሰብአ ፡
                  ሲቂሞን ፡ ለቤተ ፡ አቢሜሌክ ፤

translations.lxx: And God sent an evil spirit between Abimelech and the men of Sicima; and the men of Sicima dealt treacherously with the house of Abimelech:
translations.kjv: Then God sent an evil spirit between Abimelech and the men of Shechem; and the men of Shechem dealt treacherously with Abimelech:

verses.geez:
ከመ ፡ ይግባእ ፡ ኀጢአቱ ፡ ዘ፸ደቂቀ ፡ ኢየሮቦዓም ፡ ወደሞሙ ፡ ወይትፈደዮ ፡ ለአቢሜሌክ ፡ እኁሆሙ ፡ ዘቀተሎሙ ፡
                  ወላዕለ ፡ ሰብአ ፡ ሲቂሞን ፡ እለ ፡ አጽንዕዋ ፡ ለእዴሁ ፡ ከመ ፡ ይቅትሎሙ ፡ ለአኀዊሁ ።

translations.lxx: to bring the injury done to the seventy sons of Jerobaal, and to lay their blood upon their brother Abimelech, who slew them, and upon the men of Sicima, because they strengthened his hands to slay his brethren.
translations.kjv: That the cruelty done to the threescore and ten sons of Jerubbaal might come, and their blood be laid upon Abimelech their brother, which slew them; and upon the men of Shechem, which aided him in the killing of his brethren.

verses.geez:
ወአንበሩ ፡ ሎቱ ፡ ሰብአ ፡ ሲቂሞን ፡ ማዕገተ ፡ ውስተ ፡ አርእስተ ፡ አድባር ፡ ወየሀይዱ ፡ ኵሎ ፡ ዘየኀልፍ ፡ ፍኖተ
                  ፡ እንተ ፡ ላዕሌሆሙ ፡ ወዜነውዎ ፡ ለአቢሜሌክ ።

translations.lxx: And the men of Sicima set liers in wait against him on the top of the mountains, and robbed every one who passed by them on the way; and it was reported to the king Abimelech.
translations.kjv: And the men of Shechem set liers in wait for him in the top of the mountains, and they robbed all that came along that way by them: and it was told Abimelech.

verses.geez: [ወመጽአ ፡] ጋአድ ፡ ወልደ ፡ አቤድ ፡ ወአኀዊሁ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ሲቂማ ፡ ወኀብሩ ፡ ምስሌሁ ፡ ሰብአ ፡ ሲቂማ ።

translations.lxx: And Gaal son of Jobel came, and his brethren, and passed by Sicima, and the men of Sicima trusted in him.
translations.kjv: And Gaal the son of Ebed came with his brethren, and went over to Shechem: and the men of Shechem put their confidence in him.

verses.geez:
ወወፅኡ ፡ ሐቅለ ፡ ወቀሠሙ ፡ አዕጻዳተ ፡ ወይኖሙ ፡ ወአኬዱ ፡ ወገብሩ ፡ በዓለ ፡ ወቦኡ ፡ ቤተ ፡ አምላከሙ ፡ ወበልዑ
                  ፡ ወሰትዩ ፡ ወረገምዎ ፡ ለአቢሜሌክ ።

translations.lxx: And they went out into the field, and gathered their grapes, and trod them, and made merry; and they brought the grapes into the house of their god, and ate and drank, and cursed Abimelech.
translations.kjv: And they went out into the fields, and gathered their vineyards, and trode the grapes, and made merry, and went into the house of their god, and did eat and drink, and cursed Abimelech.

verses.geez:
ወይቤ ፡ ጋድ ፡ ወልደ ፡ አቤድ ፡ መኑ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ አቢሜሌክ ፡ ወመኑ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ወልደ ፡ ሴኬም ፡ ከመ ፡ ንትቀነይ ፡
                  ሎቱ ፡ አኮኑ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ወልደ ፡ ሮቦዓም ፡ ወዜቡል ፡ (ወ)ዐቃቢሁ ፡ ገብሩ ፡ ወሰብአ ፡ ኤሞር ፡ አቡሁ ፡ ለሴኬም ፡
                  ወለምንት ፡ ንትቀነይ ፡ ሎቱ ፡ ንሕነ ።

translations.lxx: And Gaal the son of Jobel said, Who is Abimelech, and who is the son of Sychem, that we should serve him? Is he not the son of Jerobaal, and is not Zebul his steward, his servant with the son of Emmor the father of Sychem? and why should we serve him?
translations.kjv: And Gaal the son of Ebed said, Who is Abimelech, and who is Shechem, that we should serve him? is not he the son of Jerubbaal? and Zebul his officer? serve the men of Hamor the father of Shechem: for why should we serve him?

verses.geez:
ወመኑ ፡ እመ ፡ አግብኦ ፡ ለዝክቱ ፡ ሕዝብ ፡ ውስተ ፡ እዴየ ፡ ወኣፍልሶ ፡ ለአቢሜሌክ ፡ ወእበሎ ፡ ለአቢሜሌክ ፡
                  አብዝኅ ፡ ኀይለከ ፡ ወፃእ ።

translations.lxx: And would that this people were under my hand! then would I remove Abimelech, and I would say to him, Multiply thy host, and come out.
translations.kjv: And would to God this people were under my hand! then would I remove Abimelech. And he said to Abimelech, Increase thine army, and come out.

verses.geez: ወሰምዐ ፡ ዜቡል ፡ መልአከ ፡ ሀገር ፡ ዘይቤ ፡ ጋድ ፡ ወልደ ፡ አቤድ ፡ ወተምዕዐ ፡ መዐተ ።

translations.lxx: And Zebul the ruler of the city heard the words of Gaal the son of Jobel, and he was very angry.
translations.kjv: And when Zebul the ruler of the city heard the words of Gaal the son of Ebed, his anger was kindled.

verses.geez:
ወፈነወ ፡ መ[ላ]እክተ ፡ ኀበ ፡ አቢሜሌክ ፡ ምስለ ፡ አምኃ ፡ እንዘ ፡ ይብል ፡ ናሁአ ፡ [ጋድ]አ ፡ ወልደ ፡ አቤድ ፡
                  ወአኀዊሁ ፡ መጽኡ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ሲቂማ ፡ ወናሁ ፡ ይትቃተልዋ ፡ ለሀገር ፡ በእንቲአከ ።

translations.lxx: And he sent messengers to Abimelech secretly, saying, Behold, Gaal the son of Jobel and his brethren are come to Sychem; and behold, they have besieged the city against thee.
translations.kjv: And he sent messengers unto Abimelech privily, saying, Behold, Gaal the son of Ebed and his brethren be come to Shechem; and, behold, they fortify the city against thee.

verses.geez: ወይእዜኒ ፡ ተንሥእ ፡ በሌሊት ፡ አንተ ፡ ወሕዝብ ፡ ዘምስሌከ ፡ ወዕግት ፡ ውስተ ፡ ሐቅል ።

translations.lxx: And now rise up by night, thou and the people with thee, and lay wait in the field.
translations.kjv: Now therefore up by night, thou and the people that is with thee, and lie in wait in the field:

verses.geez: ወበጽባሕ ፡ ጊዜ ፡ ይሠርቅ ፡ ፀሐይ ፡ ጊሥ ፡ ወሩዳአ ፡ ለሀገርአ ።

translations.lxx: And it shall come to pass in the morning at sunrising, thou shalt rise up early and draw toward the city; and behold, he and the people with him will come forth against thee, and thou shalt do to him according to thy power.
translations.kjv: And it shall be, that in the morning, as soon as the sun is up, thou shalt rise early, and set upon the city: and, behold, when he and the people that is with him come out against thee, then mayest thou do to them as thou shalt find occasion.

verses.geez: ወመጽአ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ወሕዝብ ፡ ዘምስሌሁ ፡ በሌሊት ፡ ወዐገትዋ ፡ ለሲቂማ ፡ [በ]አርባዕቱ ፡ ሰራዊት ።

translations.lxx: And Abimelech and all the people with him rose up by night, and formed an ambuscade against Sychem in four companies.
translations.kjv: And Abimelech rose up, and all the people that were with him, by night, and they laid wait against Shechem in four companies.

verses.geez:
ወሶበ ፡ ጸብሐ ፡ ወፅአ ፡ [ጋድ ፡] ወልደ ፡ አቤድ ፡ ወቆመ ፡ ኀበ ፡ ኆኅተ ፡ አንቀጸ ፡ ሀገር ፡ ወተንሥአ ፡
                  አቢሜሌክ ፡ ወሕዝብ ፡ ዘምስሌሁ ፡ እምኀበ ፡ የዐግቱ ።

translations.lxx: And Gaal the son of Jobel went forth, and stood by the door of the gate of the city: and Abimelech and the people with him rose up from the ambuscade.
translations.kjv: And Gaal the son of Ebed went out, and stood in the entering of the gate of the city: and Abimelech rose up, and the people that were with him, from lying in wait.

verses.geez:
ወርእየ ፡ ጋድ ፡ ወልደ ፡ አቤድ ፡ ሕዝበ ፡ ወይቤሎ ፡ ለዜቡል ፡ ናሁ ፡ ሕዝብ ፡ ይወርድ ፡ እምነ ፡ ርእሰ ፡ ደብር ፡
                  ወይቤሎ ፡ ዜቡል ፡ ጽላሎተ ፡ አድባር ፡ ትሬኢ ፡ አንተሰ ፡ ከመ ፡ ሰብእ ።

translations.lxx: And Gaal the son of Jobel saw the people, and said to Zebul, Behold, a people comes down from the top of the mountains: and Zebul said to him, Thou seest the shadow of the mountains as men.
translations.kjv: And when Gaal saw the people, he said to Zebul, Behold, there come people down from the top of the mountains. And Zebul said unto him, Thou seest the shadow of the mountains as if they were men.

verses.geez:
ወደገመ ፡ ዓዲ ፡ ጋድ ፡ ብሂሎቶ ፡ ወይቤሎ ፡ ናሁ ፡ ሕዝብ ፡ ይወርድ ፡ መንገለ ፡ ባሕር ፡ እምነ ፡ ኀበ ፡ ሕንብርተ
                  ፡ ምድር ፡ ወአሐዱ ፡ ሰርዌ ፡ ይመጽእ ፡ እምነ ፡ ፍኖተ ፡ ኦ [መ] ፡ አንጸሮ ።

translations.lxx: And Gaal continued to speak and said, Behold, a people comes down westward from the part bordering on the middle of the land, and another company comes by the way of Helon Maonenim.
translations.kjv: And Gaal spake again and said, See there come people down by the middle of the land, and another company come along by the plain of Meonenim.

verses.geez:
ወይቤሎ ፡ ዜቡል ፡ አይቴ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ይእዜ ፡ ዝክቱ ፡ አፉከ ፡ ዘትቤ ፡ መኑ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ አቢሜሌክ ፡ ከመ ፡ ንትቀነይ
                  ፡ ሎቱ ፡ አኮኑ ፡ ዝንቱ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ሕዝብ ፡ ዘተዐየርከ ፡ ፃእኬ ፡ ይእዜ ፡ ወተቃተሎሙ ።

translations.lxx: And Zebul said to him, And where is thy mouth as thou spokest, Who is Abimelech that we should serve him? Is not this the people whom thou despisedst? go forth now, and set the battle in array against him.
translations.kjv: Then said Zebul unto him, Where is now thy mouth, wherewith thou saidst, Who is Abimelech, that we should serve him? is not this the people that thou hast despised? go out, I pray now, and fight with them.

verses.geez: ወወፅአ ፡ ጋድ ፡ እምነ ፡ ቅድሜሆሙ ፡ ለሰብአ ፡ ሲቂማ ፡ ወተቃተሎ ፡ ለአቢሜሌክ ።

translations.lxx: And Gaal went forth before the men of Sychem, and set the battle in array against Abimelech.
translations.kjv: And Gaal went out before the men of Shechem, and fought with Abimelech.

verses.geez: ወዴገኖ ፡ አቤሜሌክ ፡ ወጐየ ፡ እምቅድመ ፡ ገጹ ፡ ወወድቁ ፡ ብዙኃን ፡ ወተቀትሉ ፡ እስከ ፡ አንቀጸ ፡ ሀገር ።

translations.lxx: And Abimelech pursued him, and he fled from before him; and many fell down slain as far as the door of the gate.
translations.kjv: And Abimelech chased him, and he fled before him, and many were overthrown and wounded, even unto the entering of the gate.

verses.geez:
ወነበረ ፡ አቢሜሌክ ፡ ውስተ ፡ አሪማ ፡ ወአውፅኦሙ ፡ ዜቡል ፡ ለጋእድ ፡ ወለአኀዊሁ ፡ ወከልኦሙ ፡ ነቢረ ፡ ውስተ ፡
                  ሲቂማ ።

translations.lxx: And Abimelech entered into Arema, and Zebul cast out Gaal and his brethren, so that they should not dwell in Sychem.
translations.kjv: And Abimelech dwelt at Arumah: and Zebul thrust out Gaal and his brethren, that they should not dwell in Shechem.

verses.geez: ወእምዝ ፡ በሳኒታ ፡ ወፅአ ፡ ሕዝብ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ገዳም ፡ ወዜነውዎ ፡ ለአቢሜሌክ ።

translations.lxx: And it came to pass on the second day that the people went out into the field, and one brought word to Abimelech.
translations.kjv: And it came to pass on the morrow, that the people went out into the field; and they told Abimelech.

verses.geez:
ወነሥአ ፡ ሕዝቦ ፡ ወከፈሎሙ ፡ ለሠለስቱ ፡ ሰራዊት ፡ ወዐገተ ፡ ቦሙ ፡ ወሶበ ፡ ይኔጽር ፡ ወናሁ ፡ ሕዝብ ፡ ይወፅእ ፡
                  እምነ ፡ ሀገር ፡ ወተንሥአ ፡ ላዕሌሆሙ ፡ ወቀተሎመ ።

translations.lxx: And he took the people, and divided them into three companies, and formed an ambush in the field; and he looked, and, behold, the people went forth out of the city, and he rose up against them, and smote them.
translations.kjv: And he took the people, and divided them into three companies, and laid wait in the field, and looked, and, behold, the people were come forth out of the city; and he rose up against them, and smote them.

verses.geez:
ወአቢሜሌክሰ ፡ ወሰርዌ ፡ ዘምስሌሁ ፡ ቆሙ ፡ ዲፓ ፡ ኀበ ፡ ኆኅተ ፡ አንቀጸ ፡ ሀገር ፡ ወእልክቱሰ ፡ ክልኤቱ ፡ ሰራዊት
                  ፡ ተዘርዉ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ገዳም ፡ ወቀተልዎሙ ።

translations.lxx: And Abimelech and the chiefs of companies that were with him rushed forward, and stood by the door of the gate of the city; and the two other companies rushed forward upon all that were in the field, and smote them.
translations.kjv: And Abimelech, and the company that was with him, rushed forward, and stood in the entering of the gate of the city: and the two other companies ran upon all the people that were in the fields, and slew them.

verses.geez:
ወአቢሜሌክሰ ፡ ይትቃተል ፡ ምስለ ፡ ሀገር ፡ ኵላ ፡ ይእተ ፡ ዕለተ ፡ ወአስተጋብእዋ ፡ ለሀገር ፡ ወሕዝበሰ ፡ ዘውስቴታ
                  ፡ ቀተለ ፡ ወዘርአ ፡ ውስቴታ ፡ ፄወ ።

translations.lxx: And Abimelech fought against the city all that day, and took the city, and slew the people that were in it, and destroyed the city, and sowed it with salt.
translations.kjv: And Abimelech fought against the city all that day; and he took the city, and slew the people that was therein, and beat down the city, and sowed it with salt.

verses.geez: ወሰምዑ ፡ ኵሎሙ ፡ ሰብአ ፡ ማኅፈደ ፡ ሲቂሞን ፡ ወቦኡ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ጸወነ ፡ ቤተ ፡ በዓል ።

translations.lxx: And all the men of the tower of Sychem heard, and came to the gathering of Bæthel-berith.
translations.kjv: And when all the men of the tower of Shechem heard that, they entered into an hold of the house of the god Berith.

verses.geez: ወዜነውዎ ፡ ለአቢሜሌክ ፡ ከመ ፡ ተጋብኡ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ሰብአ ፡ ማኅፈደ ፡ ሲቂማ ።

translations.lxx: And it was reported to Abimelech, that all the men of the tower of Sychem were gathered together.
translations.kjv: And it was told Abimelech, that all the men of the tower of Shechem were gathered together.

verses.geez:
ወዐርገ ፡ አቢሜሌክ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ደብረ ፡ ሄርሞን ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ወሕዝብ ፡ ዘምስሌሁ ፡ ወነሥአ ፡ አቢሜሌክ ፡ ጕድበ ፡ ውስተ
                  ፡ እዴሁ ፡ ወገመደ ፡ ጾረ ፡ ዕፀው ፡ ወነሥአ ፡ ወጾሮ ፡ ውስተ ፡ መታክፊሁ ፡ ወይቤሎሙ ፡ ለሕዝብ ፡ ለእለ ፡ ምስሌሁ ፡
                  ዘከመ ፡ ርኢክሙኒ ፡ እገብር ፡ ግበሩ ፡ አንትሙኒ ፡ ፍጡነ ፡ ከመ ፡ አነ ፡ ገበርኩ ።

translations.lxx: And Abimelech went up to the mount of Selmon, and all the people that were with him; and Abimelech took an axe in his hand, and cut down a branch of a tree, and took it, and laid it on his shoulders; and said to the people that were with him, What ye see me doing, do quickly as I.
translations.kjv: And Abimelech gat him up to mount Zalmon, he and all the people that were with him; and Abimelech took an axe in his hand, and cut down a bough from the trees, and took it, and laid it on his shoulder, and said unto the people that were with him, What ye have seen me do, make haste, and do as I have done.

verses.geez:
ወገዘሙ ፡ እሙንቱኒ ፡ ኵሎሙ ፡ ጾሮሙ ፡ ወነሥኡ ፡ ወተለውዎ ፡ ለአቢሜሌክ ፡ ወአንበሩ ፡ ኀበ ፡ ጸወን ፡ ወአውዐዩ ፡
                  ላዕሌሆሙ ፡ ጸወኖሙ ፡ በእሳት ፡ ወሞቱ ፡ ኵሎሙ ፡ ሰብአ ፡ ሲቂማ ፡ ዘማኅፈዱ ፡ ወየአክሉ ፡ ዐሠርተ ፡ ምእተ ፡ ብእሲ ፡
                  ወአንስት ።

translations.lxx: And they cut down likewise even every man a branch, and went after Abimelech, and laid them against the place of gathering, and burnt the place of gathering over them with fire; and they died, even all the men of the tower of Sicima, about a thousand men and women.
translations.kjv: And all the people likewise cut down every man his bough, and followed Abimelech, and put them to the hold, and set the hold on fire upon them; so that all the men of the tower of Shechem died also, about a thousand men and women.

verses.geez: ወሖረ ፡ አቢሜሌክ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ቴቤስ ፡ ወነበሩ ፡ ላዕሌሃ ፡ ወአስተጋብእዋ ።

translations.lxx: And Abimelech went out of Bæthel-berith, and encamped against Thebes, and took it.
translations.kjv: Then went Abimelech to Thebez, and encamped against Thebez, and took it.

verses.geez:
ወቦቱ ፡ ማኅፈደ ፡ ዐቢየ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ማእከለ ፡ ሀገር ፡ ወተጸወኑ ፡ ኵሎሙ ፡ ህየ ፡ ዕደዊሆሙ ፡ ወአንስቲያሆሙ ፡ ወኵሉ
                  ፡ ዐበይተ ፡ ሀገር ፡ ወዐጸዉ ፡ ላዕሌሆሙ ፡ ወዐርጉ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ናሕሰ ፡ ማኅፈድ ።

translations.lxx: And there was a strong tower in the midst of the city; and thither all the men and the women of the city fled, and shut the door without them, and went up on the roof of the tower.
translations.kjv: But there was a strong tower within the city, and thither fled all the men and women, and all they of the city, and shut it to them, and gat them up to the top of the tower.

verses.geez:
ወሖረ ፡ አቢሜሌክ ፡ ኀበ ፡ ማኅፈድ ፡ ወተቃተልዎ ፡ ወቀርበ ፡ አቢሜሌክ ፡ ኀበ ፡ ኆኅተ ፡ ማኅፈድ ፡ ከመ ፡ ያውዕዮ ፡
                  በእሳት ።

translations.lxx: And Abimelech drew near to the tower, and they besieged it; and Abimelech drew near to the door of the tower to burn it with fire.
translations.kjv: And Abimelech came unto the tower, and fought against it, and went hard unto the door of the tower to burn it with fire.

verses.geez: ወወገረቶ ፡ አሐቲ ፡ ብእሲት ፡ በስባረ ፡ ማሕረጽ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ርእሱ ፡ ለአቢሜሌክ ፡ ወቀጥቀጠቶ ፡ መልታሕቶ ።

translations.lxx: And a woman cast a piece of a millstone upon the head of Abimelech, and broke his skull.
translations.kjv: And a certain woman cast a piece of a millstone upon Abimelech’s head, and all to brake his skull.

verses.geez:
ወጸርኀ ፡ ፍጡነ ፡ ለቍልዔሁ ፡ ዘይጸውር ፡ ንዋዮ ፡ ወይቤሎ ፡ ምላኅ ፡ መጥባኅተ ፡ ወቅትለኒ ፡ ከመ ፡ ኢይበሉኒ ፡
                  ብእሲት ፡ ቀተለቶ ፡ ወወግኦ ፡ ቍልዔሁ ፡ ወሞተ ፡ አቢሜሌክ ።

translations.lxx: And he cried out quickly to the young man his armour-bearer, and said to him, Draw thy sword, and slay me, lest at any time they should say, A woman slew him: and his young man thrust him through and he died.
translations.kjv: Then he called hastily unto the young man his armourbearer, and said unto him, Draw thy sword, and slay me, that men say not of me, A woman slew him. And his young man thrust him through, and he died.

verses.geez: ወርእዩ ፡ ሰብአ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ ከመ ፡ ሞተ ፡ አቢሜሌክ ፡ ወአተዉ ፡ ኵሎሙ ፡ በሓውርቲሆሙ ።

translations.lxx: And the men of Israel saw that Abimelech was dead; and they went each to his place.
translations.kjv: And when the men of Israel saw that Abimelech was dead, they departed every man unto his place.

verses.geez: ወፈደዮ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለአቢሜሌክ ፡ እኪተ ፡ እንተ ፡ ገብረ ፡ ላዕለ ፡ አቡሁ ፡ ዘቀተለ ፡ ፸አኀዊሁ ።

translations.lxx: So God requited the wickedness of Abimelech, which he wrought against his father, in slaying his seventy brethren.
translations.kjv: Thus God rendered the wickedness of Abimelech, which he did unto his father, in slaying his seventy brethren:

verses.geez:
ወኵሎ ፡ እኪቶሙ ፡ ለሰብአ ፡ ሲቂማ ፡ ፈደዮሙ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ላዕለ ፡ ርእሶሙ ፡ ወበጽሖሙ ፡ መርገመ ፡ ኢዮአታም ፡
                  ወልደ ፡ ሮቦዓም ።

translations.lxx: And all the wickedness of the men of Sychem God requited upon their head; and the curse of Joatham the son of Jerobaal came upon them.
translations.kjv: And all the evil of the men of Shechem did God render upon their heads: and upon them came the curse of Jotham the son of Jerubbaal.
